red_flags.flag: Automotive revenue decreased 10% due to lower deliveries and average selling prices.
Significant gaps between Robotaxi promises and Level 2 driver assistance reality.
Operating income declining due to rising expenses and reduced regulatory credit revenue.

TSLA.bull_case: Transformation into a multi-layered AI platform (Robotaxi, Optimus, FSD). Leadership in autonomous driving.
TSLA.bear_case: EV market competition (BYD/Rivian), margin erosion from price cuts, high valuation risk.
